title: Dispatch Backlog
subtitle: Emergency notifications are delayed under load
objective: Design a queue-based processing architecture that stays responsive during spikes.
constraints: Separate synchronous API from heavy async work
Keep a clear path from intake to persistence

concepts.title: Intake Reliability
concepts.description: Front requests with load balancer and API tier.

concepts.title: Backpressure Control
concepts.description: Queue and workers should absorb bursts before persistence.

concepts.title: Response Optimization
concepts.description: Use cache to reduce repeated dispatch lookup latency.
